violations.text: Raw animal foods such as shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as bottled water in the reach-in retail refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Ice cream and grab and go foods packaged in the food establishment are lacking all required information on food labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the name of the food source for each major food allergen contained in the food unless the food source is already part of the common or usual name of the respective ingredient, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Boxes of ice cream were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025
One fan in walk-in freezer was observed in poor repair (causing ice accumulation). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2025
The doors to the toilet room are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Several floor tiles and coving baseboard in icecream scoop area were observed in poor repair. Physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2025
